research_question: What new atomic signal should be tested under the frozen working reference contract?

source_policy.notes: Discovery intake is restricted to Alpha158-style or literature/classic-definition sources with explicit provenance.

discovery_contract.builder_rule: each candidate builder may rank exactly one raw signal field and may not combine multiple raw signals inside the same candidate

signal_pool.interpretation: one-sentence economic explanation of the signal

source_provenance.source_locator: document title / paper title / chapter and section
source_provenance.mechanism_mapping: one-sentence mapping from source mechanism to this project field
source_provenance.independent_implementation_note: implemented with this project data contracts only; no dependency on neighboring qlib adapter stack

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: Explain why this is not merely an alias, direction variant, or horizon variant of an existing canonical signal.

discovery_contract.aggregation_rule: none; this round explicitly forbids combining signals
discovery_contract.missing_data_rule: score nulls are allowed and must be preserved for audit; no imputation or cross-signal fallback is allowed

constants_frozen.selection_contract: same calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, same TopK=10 width, and same v18 top-15 refresh hysteresis
constants_frozen.portfolio_contract: same v18 refreshed-portfolio implementation until any later family round explicitly changes it

promotion_rule.phase_gate: Only atomic signals that show directionally coherent positive edge in signal-edge diagnostics may advance into a later composability-screening or family-construction round.
promotion_rule.non_promotion_rule: A signal that shows negative or near-zero broad ordering, inverted decile structure, or clearly weaker head labels than both rank11_20 and tail labels should be rejected rather than rescued by later extraction or overlay tweaks.

disallowed_changes: Do not mix multiple raw signals into one candidate inside this round.
Do not change the calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard threshold or guard stage.
Do not change the frozen v18 refresh hysteresis rule.
Do not change benchmark or cost contracts.
Do not add extraction, weight-penalty, turnover-suppression, stability-cap, overlay, or family-composition changes inside this round.
notes: This template is for future single-signal discovery rounds only.
Every signal_pool entry must include a dedup_note before preregistration may be considered valid.
